---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Run `vcfexplorer`
2. Open file '...'
3. Apply filter '...'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 24.04, macOS 15]
- Rust version: [`rustc --version`]
- htslib version: [`dpkg -l libhts-dev` or `brew info htslib`]

## Log output

If applicable, paste relevant lines from `vcf_explorer.log`.
